info.name: Microsoft Azure Azure Action Groups API

item.name: Microsoft Azure Post Subscriptions Subscriptionid Resourcegroups Resourcegroupname Providers Microsoft Insights Actiongroups Actiongroupname Createnotifications

variable.description: (Required) The name of the action group.

request.description: Send test notifications to a set of provided receivers

response.name: The notification succeeded

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

description.content: The location header that has the polling uri.

response.name: An error occurred while sending the test notifications

item.name: Microsoft Azure Post Subscriptions Subscriptionid Resourcegroups Resourcegroupname Providers Microsoft Insights Actiongroups Actiongroupname Subscribe

variable.description: (Required) The name of the action group.

request.description: Enable a receiver in an action group. This changes the receiver's status from Disabled to Enabled. This operation is only supported for Email or SMS receivers.

response.name: The receiver was successfully enabled.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

response.name: The receiver is already enabled in the action group.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

response.name: An error occurred and the receiver could not be enabled, e.g.: 404: The action group was not found or no matching receiver was found in the action group.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

item.name: Microsoft Azure Put Subscriptions Subscriptionid Resourcegroups Resourcegroupname Providers Microsoft Insights Actiongroups Actiongroupname

variable.description: (Required) The name of the action group.

request.description: Create a new action group or update an existing one.

response.name: An existing action group was successfully updated.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

response.name: A new action group was successfully created.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

response.name: An error occurred and the action group could not be created or updated.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

item.name: Microsoft Azure Get Subscriptions Subscriptionid Resourcegroups Resourcegroupname Providers Microsoft Insights Actiongroups Actiongroupname

variable.description: (Required) The name of the action group.

response.name: The request succeeded.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

response.name: An error occurred and the action group could not be retrieved. 404: The action group does not exist.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

item.name: Microsoft Azure Delete Subscriptions Subscriptionid Resourcegroups Resourcegroupname Providers Microsoft Insights Actiongroups Actiongroupname

variable.description: (Required) The name of the action group.

response.name: The action group was successfully deleted.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

response.name: The action group does not exist. It may have already been deleted.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

response.name: An error occurred and the action group could not be deleted.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

item.name: Microsoft Azure Patch Subscriptions Subscriptionid Resourcegroups Resourcegroupname Providers Microsoft Insights Actiongroups Actiongroupname

variable.description: (Required) The name of the action group.

request.description: Updates an existing action group's tags. To update other fields use the CreateOrUpdate method.

response.name: An existing action group was successfully updated.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

response.name: Error response describing why the operation failed.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

response.name: The request succeeded.

response.name: An error occurred and the list of action groups could not be retrieved.
